_comment: App Store Connect + Google Play metadata for Spinr Driver. Fill in the values marked TODO before submitting. See docs/deploy/04-mobile-eas.md for submission steps.

app_store_connect.name: Spinr Driver
app_store_connect.subtitle: Drive. Earn More. 0% Commission.
app_store_connect.apple_id: TODO: numeric App Store Connect app ID for the driver app

en-CA.description:
Spinr Driver is the partner app for Saskatchewan's 0% commission rideshare platform.

Keep 100% of every fare — Spinr never takes a cut.

• Go online instantly — one tap to start accepting rides
• Clear turn-by-turn navigation to pickup and dropoff
• OTP handshake confirms the right rider every time
• Live earnings dashboard — see today's total in real time
• Weekly earnings reports and downloadable tax documents (T4A-ready CSV)
• Quest challenges with bonus payouts for hitting trip targets
• Loyalty points redeemable for fuel discounts and accessories
• Driver wallet for instant payouts
• Push notifications for new ride requests even when backgrounded
• Dark mode and accessible design
en-CA.release_notes:
v2026.04 — initial public release.
• Quest challenges and loyalty rewards
• Wallet with instant payout
• Accessibility improvements throughout
• Dark mode
en-CA.promotional_text: Saskatchewan's first 0% commission rideshare. Sign up now — no weekly fees, ever.

app_store_connect.review_notes:
This is the driver partner app for a rideshare marketplace. Drivers authenticate via SMS OTP and complete a document-upload onboarding flow before they can go online. Location is used continuously while the driver is online so ride requests and navigation update in real time.

Test account (driver):
  Phone: +1 306 555 0202
  OTP: 1234 (test environment)
  Onboarding: tap 'Skip for review' on the document upload screen to bypass the real upload in the review build.

Backend smoke-test URL: https://spinr-api.fly.dev/healthz

Payments use Stripe test mode. No real charges or payouts are made during review.

en-CA.title: Spinr Driver
en-CA.short_description: Drive in Saskatchewan. Keep 100% of every fare.
